title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: The talk argues that humans remain better than AI at editing documents reliably, particularly because .docx files contain complex structural logic that AI struggles to manipulate without breaking other elements. The fundamental challenge is that AI treats documents as files rather than as software with interdependent rules.
